auditLog.detail: Assigned TPM: TPM · Start 2026-07-22 · Project Goal: abc

customProjects.name: Tron
customProjects.goal: High-value enterprise AI adoption is bottlenecked because standard benchmarks focus on isolated, predictable scripts rather than live environments. Our RL Environment focuses on raw LLM capabilities through direct tool execution across multiple Enterprise domains like ITSM, CSM, Email, Calendar, HR, etc.

kickoffMail.subject: Tron kickoff
kickoffMail.goal: High-value enterprise AI adoption is bottlenecked because standard benchmarks focus on isolated, predictable scripts rather than live environments. Our RL Environment focuses on raw LLM capabilities through direct tool execution across multiple Enterprise domains like ITSM, CSM, Email, Calendar, HR, etc.

auditLog.detail: $800 · R&D team · pending CTO review · 500 tasks
Project Team added Akash Kumar (Engineer), Kshitiz Mehta (Engineer), Piyush Chandra (R&D), Shubhi Khandelwal (Quality Lead), Viksit Kumar Chauhan (R&D)

Start 2026-07-09 · Project Goal: High-value enterprise AI adoption is bottlenecked because standard benchmarks focus on isolated, predictable scripts rather than live environments. Our RL Environment focuses on raw LLM capabilities through direct tool execution across multiple Enterprise domains like ITSM, CSM, Email, Calendar, HR, etc.

customProjects.name: Zoro
customProjects.goal: Enterprise AI agents fail not because they lack knowledge, but because they cannot sustain coherent decisions across long-horizon, multi-constraint environments. Zoro puts this to the test, an LLM agent manages a real supermarket: pricing, inventory, supplier orders, and cash flow over 180 simulated days of actual Dominick's transaction data. Zoro builds the task library, evaluation harness, and trajectory dataset on top of RetailBench to turn these failure modes into a scalable, high-signal training corpus.

kickoffMail.subject: Zoro kickoff
kickoffMail.goal: Enterprise AI agents fail not because they lack knowledge, but because they cannot sustain coherent decisions across long-horizon, multi-constraint environments. Zoro puts this to the test, an LLM agent manages a real supermarket: pricing, inventory, supplier orders, and cash flow over 180 simulated days of actual Dominick's transaction data. Zoro builds the task library, evaluation harness, and trajectory dataset on top of RetailBench to turn these failure modes into a scalable, high-signal training corpus.

auditLog.action: Budget approved and routed to IT

auditLog.detail: $600 · R&D team · pending CTO review · 500 tasks

R&D: Dhawal Bathre, Mumukshu Panchal · Start 2026-07-09 · Project Goal: Enterprise AI agents fail not because they lack knowledge, but because they cannot sustain coherent decisions across long-horizon, multi-constraint environments. Zoro puts this to the test, an LLM agent manages a real supermarket: pricing, inventory, supplier orders, and cash flow over 180 simulated days of actual Dominick's transaction data. budgetReviews.justification: Subscription budget for Zoro baselining — Claude Code Max 20x (3 subscriptions) shared across the pod, and GPT Codex Pro 20x (3 accounts) for GPT-5.6 baselining.

history.action: Approved by CTO and forwarded to CFO

budgetReviews.justification: Subscription budget for Tron — Claude Code Max 20x (1 subscription) for the pod, plus 2 additional Claude Code Max 20x subscriptions for trajectory generation (Opus 4.8 baselining).
